intro: Lucia and Sam end up sharing a table at a busy cafe in Madrid.

messages.speaker: sam
messages.es: Hola! Perdon, hablo un poco de español.
messages.en: Hi! Sorry, I speak a little Spanish.

messages.speaker: lucia
messages.en: My name is Lucia. And you?

messages.speaker: sam
messages.en: My name is Sam. Nice to meet you.

messages.speaker: lucia
messages.en: Nice to meet you, Sam. Where are you from?

messages.speaker: sam
messages.es: Soy de Canada. Estoy de vacaciones.
messages.en: I'm from Canada. I'm on holiday.

messages.speaker: sam
messages.es: Quiero un cafe con leche. Y tu?
messages.en: I'd like a coffee with milk. And you?

messages.speaker: lucia
messages.es: Quiero un te y un cruasan.
messages.en: I'd like a tea and a croissant.

messages.speaker: sam
messages.es: Cuanto cuesta el cafe con leche?
messages.en: How much is the coffee with milk?

messages.speaker: sam
messages.es: Perfecto. Necesito la cuenta, por favor.
messages.en: Perfect. I need the bill, please.

messages.speaker: lucia
messages.es: Necesito un cruasan para llevar, por favor.
messages.en: I need a croissant to take away, please.

questions.quote: Necesito un cruasan para llevar, por favor.

questions.prompt: How much does the coffee with milk cost?

items: They order coffee and a croissant
